if.test: search6 != null and search6 != 'GRADE' and search6 != 'NOTGRADE'
search7 != null and search7 != 'PII' and search7 != 'NOTPII'

trim.if: and val3 is not null and val3 != ''
and val2 is not null and val2 like '%|%'
and (val2 is null or val2 not like '%|%')
and t.upddate < DATE_ADD(STR_TO_DATE(#{search13, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, '%Y/%m/%d'), INTERVAL 1 DAY)

mapper.select: select db, owner, table_name, column_name, column_id, pk_yn, pk_position, full_data_type, data_type, data_length, domain, piitype, piigrade, encript_flag, scramble_type, DATE_FORMAT(regdate, '%Y/%m/%d') as regdate, DATE_FORMAT(upddate, '%Y/%m/%d') as upddate, reguserid, upduserid, masterkey, masteryn, table_comment, column_comment, val1, val2, val3, val4 from cotdl.tbl_metatable order by db, owner, table_name, column_id
mapper.insert: insert into COTDL.tbl_metatable (db, owner, table_name, column_name, column_id, pk_yn, pk_position, full_data_type, data_type, data_length, domain, piitype, piigrade, encript_flag, scramble_type, regdate, upddate, reguserid, upduserid, masterkey, masteryn, table_comment, column_comment, val1, val2, val3, val4) values (#{db, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{owner, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{table_name, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{column_name, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{column_id, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{pk_yn, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{pk_position, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{full_data_type, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{data_type, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{data_length, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{domain, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{piitype, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{piigrade, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{encript_flag, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{scramble_type, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, NOW(), NOW(), #{reguserid, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{upduserid, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{masterkey, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{masteryn, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{table_comment, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{column_comment, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{val1, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{val2, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{val3, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{val4, jdbcType=VARCHAR})

insert into COTDL.tbl_metatable (db, owner, table_name, column_name, column_id, pk_yn, pk_position, full_data_type, data_type, data_length, domain, piitype, piigrade, encript_flag, scramble_type, regdate, upddate, reguserid, upduserid, masterkey, masteryn, table_comment, column_comment, val1, val2, val3, val4) values (#{db, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{owner, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{table_name, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{column_name, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{column_id, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{pk_yn, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{pk_position, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{full_data_type, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{data_type, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{data_length, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{domain, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{piitype, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{piigrade, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{encript_flag, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{scramble_type, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, NOW(), NOW(), #{reguserid, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{upduserid, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{masterkey, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{masteryn, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{table_comment, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{column_comment, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{val1, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{val2, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{val3, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{val4, jdbcType=VARCHAR})
mapper.select: select db, owner, table_name, column_name, column_id, pk_yn, pk_position, full_data_type, data_type, data_length, domain, piitype, piigrade, encript_flag, scramble_type, DATE_FORMAT(regdate, '%Y/%m/%d') as regdate, DATE_FORMAT(upddate, '%Y/%m/%d') as upddate, reguserid, upduserid, masterkey, masteryn, table_comment, column_comment, val1, val2, val3, val4 from cotdl.tbl_metatable where db= #{db, jdbcType=VARCHAR} and owner= #{owner, jdbcType=VARCHAR} and table_name = #{table_name, jdbcType=VARCHAR} and column_name = #{column_name, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
mapper.update: update cotdl.tbl_metatable set pk_yn= #{pk_yn, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, pk_position= #{pk_position, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, full_data_type= #{full_data_type, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, data_type= #{data_type, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, data_length= #{data_length, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, domain= #{domain, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, piitype= #{piitype, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, piigrade= #{piigrade, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, encript_flag= #{encript_flag, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, scramble_type= #{scramble_type, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, masterkey= #{masterkey, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, masteryn= #{masteryn, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, table_comment= #{table_comment, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, column_comment= #{column_comment, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, val1= #{val1, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, val2= #{val2, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, val4= #{val4, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, upddate= NOW() where db = #{db, jdbcType=VARCHAR} and owner = #{owner, jdbcType=VARCHAR} and table_name = #{table_name, jdbcType=VARCHAR} and column_name = #{column_name, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
mapper.select:
select db, owner, table_name, column_name, column_id, pk_yn, pk_position, full_data_type, data_type, data_length, domain, piitype, piigrade, encript_flag, scramble_type, DATE_FORMAT(regdate,'%Y/%m/%d') as regdate, DATE_FORMAT(upddate,'%Y/%m/%d') as upddate, reguserid, upduserid, masterkey, masteryn, table_comment, column_comment, val1, val2, val3, val4 from cotdl.tbl_metatable
order by
val3 DESC,
upddate DESC,
regdate DESC,
db, owner, table_name, column_id
limit #{offset}, #{amount}

select db, owner, table_name, column_name, column_id, pk_yn, pk_position, full_data_type, data_type, data_length, domain, piitype, piigrade, encript_flag, scramble_type, DATE_FORMAT(regdate, '%Y/%m/%d') as regdate, DATE_FORMAT(upddate, '%Y/%m/%d') as upddate, reguserid, upduserid, masterkey, masteryn, table_comment, column_comment, val1, val2, val3, val4 from cotdl.tbl_metatable where db= #{db, jdbcType=VARCHAR} and owner= #{owner, jdbcType=VARCHAR} and table_name = #{table_name, jdbcType=VARCHAR}

select db, owner, table_name, column_name, column_id, pk_yn, pk_position, full_data_type, data_type, data_length, domain, piitype, piigrade, encript_flag, scramble_type, DATE_FORMAT(regdate, '%Y/%m/%d') as regdate, DATE_FORMAT(upddate, '%Y/%m/%d') as upddate, reguserid, upduserid, masterkey, masteryn, table_comment, column_comment, val1, val2, val3, val4 from cotdl.tbl_metatable where db= #{db, jdbcType=VARCHAR} and owner= #{owner, jdbcType=VARCHAR} and table_name = #{table_name, jdbcType=VARCHAR} and scramble_type is not null

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT CONCAT(db, '.', owner, '.', table_name)) AS tableCount, COUNT(*) AS columnCount, SUM(CASE WHEN val3 IS NOT NULL AND val3 != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS verifiedCount, SUM(CASE WHEN val3 IS NULL OR val3 = '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS unverifiedCount, SUM(CASE WHEN piitype IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS piiCount FROM cotdl.tbl_metatable
SELECT DISTINCT db, owner FROM cotdl.tbl_metatable ORDER BY db, owner

with registered_cols as ( SELECT t.* , s.jobid as jobid , DATE_FORMAT(s.regdate, '%Y/%m/%d') as confregdate FROM cotdl.tbl_metatable t inner join ( select a.jobid, a.version, a.jobname, b.db, b.owner, b.table_name, b.regdate from cotdl.tbl_piijob a, cotdl.tbl_piisteptable b where 1=1 and a.version in (select max(cast(version as INTEGER)) from cotdl.tbl_piijob where jobid = a.jobid) and a.status = 'ACTIVE' and a.runtype = 'REGULAR' and a.jobtype = 'PII' /*and a.POLICY_ID = 'PII_POLICY3'*/
and a.POLICY_ID = #{search6}
and a.jobid = b.jobid and a.version = b.version and b.exetype ='DELETE' ) s on t.db =s.db and t.owner = s.owner and t.table_name = s.table_name where t.PIITYPE is not null and t.PIITYPE not in ('3_3_corpno') union SELECT t.* , s.jobid as jobid , DATE_FORMAT(s.regdate, '%Y/%m/%d') as confregdate FROM cotdl.tbl_metatable t inner join ( select a.jobid, a.version, a.jobname, b.db, b.owner, b.table_name, c.column_name, b.regdate from cotdl.tbl_piijob a , cotdl.tbl_piisteptable b, cotdl.tbl_piisteptableupdate C where 1=1 and a.version in (select max(cast(version as INTEGER)) from cotdl.tbl_piijob where jobid = a.jobid) and a.status = 'ACTIVE' and a.runtype = 'REGULAR' and a.jobtype = 'PII' /*and a.POLICY_ID = 'PII_POLICY3'*/
and a.POLICY_ID = #{search6}
and a.jobid = b.jobid and a.version = b.version and a.jobid = c.jobid and a.version = c.version and b.exetype ='UPDATE' and b.seq1 = c.seq1 and b.seq2 = c.seq2 and b.seq3 = c.seq3 ) s on t.db =s.db and t.owner = s.owner and t.table_name = s.table_name and t.column_name = s.column_name where t.PIITYPE is not null and t.PIITYPE not in ('3_3_corpno') ) SELECT t.db, t.owner, t.table_name, t.column_name, t.column_id, t.pk_yn, t.pk_position, t.full_data_type, t.data_type, t.data_length, t.domain, t.piitype, t.piigrade, t.encript_flag, t.scramble_type, DATE_FORMAT(t.regdate,'%Y/%m/%d') as regdate, DATE_FORMAT(t.upddate,'%Y/%m/%d') as upddate, t.reguserid, t.upduserid, t.masterkey, t.masteryn, t.table_comment, t.column_comment, t.val1, t.val2, t.val3, t.val4 , r.jobid AS jobid , r.confregdate AS confregdate , null as detect_results , null as detect_date FROM cotdl.tbl_metatable t LEFT OUTER JOIN registered_cols r on t.db =r.db and t.owner = r.owner and t.table_name = r.table_name and t.column_name = r.column_name where t.PIITYPE is not null and t.PIITYPE not in ('3_3_corpno') /*and r.column_name is not null*/
order by
regdate DESC,
val3 DESC,
upddate DESC,
db, owner, table_name, column_id
limit #{offset}, #{amount}
